popularStory.headline: My Maternal 19th. Great Grandmother, Lady Jean or Joan Campbell
popularStory.description:
Name: Lady Joan Campbell
Born: 1295 in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland
Married: about 1318 in Argyll, Scotland to Sir John Mor Lamont, 3rd. Laird of Clan Lamont
Children: (6)
Mary Isabella Lamont 1318–1364 …

zh.Loch Awe, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍
zh.Lamont, Cowal Peninsula, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾拉莫特
zh.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont於1290年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍時，他的父親Malcolm Lamont II40歲，母親Lady Christina Macdougall25歲。他於1318年之前與Jean Campbell在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1353年在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾拉莫特享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾吉爾分南。

zh-hans.Loch Awe, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍
zh-hans.Lamont, Cowal Peninsula, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾拉莫特
zh-hans.Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾分南
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont于1290年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍时，他的父亲Malcolm Lamont II40岁，母亲Lady Christina Macdougall25岁。他于1318年之前与Jean Campbell在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1353年在英国苏格兰阿吉爾拉莫特享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾吉爾分南。

nameMeanings.name: Lamont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: from the medieval personal name Lagman, which is from Old Norse Lǫgmathr, composed of the elements lǫg, plural of lag ‘law’ (from leggja ‘to lay down’), + mathr ‘man’ (genitive manns).
French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', from any of the places called Amont, in Haute-Saône and Haute-Vienne.

variants.name: McClammy
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from a pet form of   Lamont  .

variants.name: McClymont
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Laomuinn ‘son of Laomann’, a personal name borrowed from Old Norse and meaning ‘law giver’. See Lamont .

variants.name: Lemond
meanings: French: variant of Lemonde, a nickname from Old French monde ‘pure’, with fused masculine definite article le.
French (Lémond): variant of Laymond, itself a variant, with fused definite article l', of Aymond .

variants.name: Lemont
meanings: French: habitational name from Le Mont in the Vosges or possibly other minor places so named from Old French mont ‘mountain’. Alternatively, a variant of Lemond 2.

variants.name: Lemonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Lamont , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: Lawman
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lamont  .

English: occupational name from Middle English lagman, lagheman ‘law-man, one whose duty is to declare the law; lawyer’ (Old Norse lagmann-, lǫgmann-, oblique case of lǫgmathr). The word was also widely used as a personal name, Middle English Lagman, Lagheman.

variants.name: Lamond
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and French: variant of   Lamont  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Lamothe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Donat, Francois, Lucien, Odette, Adrien, Andree, Armand, Armande.
French: variant of   Lamotte  , or a habitational name from any of the places in France named Lamothe or La Mothe.

History: The settlement that became the city of Detroit was founded in 1701 by Antoine de la Mothe, Sieur de Cadillac (1658–1730), governor of LA. He was born into the minor nobility in Gascony, France, where his father owned the seigneury of Cadillac.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont was born in 1290, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm Lamont II, was 40 and his mother, Lady Christina Macdougall, was 25. He married Jean Campbell before 1318, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1353, in Lamont, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont est né en 1290, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm Lamont II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lady Christina Macdougall, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Jean Campbell avant 1318, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1353, à Lamont, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Kilfinan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont 1290 in Lochawe, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Lamont II 40 und seine Mutter Lady Christina Macdougall 25. Er hat vor 1318 in Argyll, Scotland Jean Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1353 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Lamont, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont è nato il nel 1290 nel Lochawe, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcolm Lamont II, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christina Macdougall, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Jean Campbell prima del 1318, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1353, nel Lamont, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamontが1290年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルロチャウで生まれた時，父Malcolm Lamont IIは40歳，母Lady Christina Macdougallは25歳であった。1318年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでJean Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1353年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルラモントで63歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルキルフィナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont(이)가 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Lamont II(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christina Macdougall(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1318년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Jean Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1353년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 램트에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 킬핀아에 묻혔다.

mn.Loch Awe, Argyll and Bute, Scotland: Lochawe, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Lamont, Cowal Peninsula, Scotland: Lamont, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont nasceu em 1290, em Lochawe, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm Lamont II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christina Macdougall, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Jean Campbell antes 1318, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1353, em Lamont, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont родился в 1290 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm Lamont II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christina Macdougall, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Jean Campbell перед 1318 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1353 г. в местности лэмонт, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности килфинан, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Lamont 3rd Laird of Lamont nació en 1290, en Lochawe, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malcolm Lamont II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lady Christina Macdougall, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Jean Campbell antes de 1318, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1353, en Lamont, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Kilfinan, Argyll, Scotland.
